targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM hosts h WHERE h.status=0 AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM host_tag bt1 WHERE bt1.hostid=h.hostid AND bt1.tag='camada' AND bt1.value='base de dados') AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM host_tag bt2 WHERE bt2.hostid=h.hostid AND bt2.tag='ambiente' AND LOWER(bt2.value) LIKE 'produ%')

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM items i JOIN hosts h ON h.hostid=i.hostid WHERE i.status=0 AND (i.key_ LIKE 'service.info["MSSQLSERVER",%' OR i.key_ LIKE 'service.info[MSSQLSERVER,%' OR i.key_ LIKE 'service.info[MSSQL$%' OR i.key_ LIKE 'service.info["MSSQL$%' OR (i.key_ LIKE 'service.info[%OracleService%' AND i.key_ NOT LIKE '%RMAN%' AND i.key_ NOT LIKE '%Backup%')) AND h.status=0 AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM host_tag bt1 WHERE bt1.hostid=h.hostid AND bt1.tag='camada' AND bt1.value='base de dados') AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM host_tag bt2 WHERE bt2.hostid=h.hostid AND bt2.tag='ambiente' AND LOWER(bt2.value) LIKE 'produ%')

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM items i JOIN hosts h ON h.hostid=i.hostid WHERE i.status=0 AND i.name LIKE 'MSSQL DB %: Tamanho dados%' AND h.status=0 AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM host_tag bt1 WHERE bt1.hostid=h.hostid AND bt1.tag='camada' AND bt1.value='base de dados') AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM host_tag bt2 WHERE bt2.hostid=h.hostid AND bt2.tag='ambiente' AND LOWER(bt2.value) LIKE 'produ%')) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(hu.value) FROM history_uint hu JOIN  (SELECT hu2.itemid, MAX(hu2.clock) mc FROM history_uint hu2 JOIN items i2 ON i2.itemid=hu2.itemid JOIN hosts h2 ON h2.hostid=i2.hostid   WHERE i2.key_='mssql.business_db.online' AND hu2.clock>UNIX_TIMESTAMP()-7200 AND h2.status=0 AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM host_tag bt1 WHERE bt1.hostid=h2.hostid AND bt1.tag='camada' AND bt1.value='base de dados') AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM host_tag bt2 WHERE bt2.hostid=h2.hostid AND bt2.tag='ambiente' AND LOWER(bt2.value) LIKE 'produ%') GROUP BY hu2.itemid) t  ON hu.itemid=t.itemid AND hu.clock=t.mc),0) AS value

SELECT SUM(v) AS value FROM ( SELECT hu.value AS v FROM history_uint hu JOIN   (SELECT hu2.itemid, MAX(hu2.clock) mc FROM history_uint hu2 JOIN items i2 ON i2.itemid=hu2.itemid JOIN hosts h2 ON h2.hostid=i2.hostid    WHERE i2.key_ IN ('mssql.data_files_size','mssql.log_files_size') AND hu2.clock>UNIX_TIMESTAMP()-7200 AND h2.status=0 AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM host_tag bt1 WHERE bt1.hostid=h2.hostid AND bt1.tag='camada' AND bt1.value='base de dados') AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM host_tag bt2 WHERE bt2.hostid=h2.hostid AND bt2.tag='ambiente' AND LOWER(bt2.value) LIKE 'produ%') GROUP BY hu2.itemid) t   ON hu.itemid=t.itemid AND hu.clock=t.mc  UNION ALL  SELECT hu.value*1024 FROM history_uint hu JOIN   (SELECT hu2.itemid, MAX(hu2.clock) mc FROM history_uint hu2 JOIN items i2 ON i2.itemid=hu2.itemid JOIN hosts h2 ON h2.hostid=i2.hostid    WHERE i2.name LIKE 'MSSQL DB %: Tamanho%' AND hu2.clock>UNIX_TIMESTAMP()-7200 AND h2.status=0 AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM host_tag bt1 WHERE bt1.hostid=h2.hostid AND bt1.tag='camada' AND bt1.value='base de dados') AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM host_tag bt2 WHERE bt2.hostid=h2.hostid AND bt2.tag='ambiente' AND LOWER(bt2.value) LIKE 'produ%') GROUP BY hu2.itemid) t   ON hu.itemid=t.itemid AND hu.clock=t.mc) x

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT i.hostid) AS value FROM items i JOIN item_rtdata rt ON rt.itemid=i.itemid JOIN hosts h ON h.hostid=i.hostid WHERE i.key_ LIKE 'db.odbc.select[mssql.business.master%' AND (rt.error LIKE '%28000%' OR rt.error LIKE '%Login failed%') AND h.status=0 AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM host_tag bt1 WHERE bt1.hostid=h.hostid AND bt1.tag='camada' AND bt1.value='base de dados') AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM host_tag bt2 WHERE bt2.hostid=h.hostid AND bt2.tag='ambiente' AND LOWER(bt2.value) LIKE 'produ%')

SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM items i JOIN item_rtdata rt ON rt.itemid=i.itemid WHERE i.hostid=h.hostid AND i.status=0 AND rt.state=0 AND i.key_ LIKE 'db.odbc.select[mssql.business.master%') THEN '1 · ODBC completo' WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM items i JOIN item_rtdata rt ON rt.itemid=i.itemid WHERE i.hostid=h.hostid AND i.status=0 AND rt.state=0 AND (i.name IN ('MSSQL Page life expectancy','MSSQL User Connections','MSSQL Number of Deadlocks/sec') OR i.name LIKE 'MSSQL DB %')) THEN '2 · Perfmon local' WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM items i WHERE i.hostid=h.hostid AND i.status=0 AND (i.key_ LIKE 'service.info["MSSQLSERVER",%' OR i.key_ LIKE 'service.info[MSSQLSERVER,%' OR i.key_ LIKE 'service.info[MSSQL$%' OR i.key_ LIKE 'service.info["MSSQL$%' OR (i.key_ LIKE 'service.info[%OracleService%' AND i.key_ NOT LIKE '%RMAN%' AND i.key_ NOT LIKE '%Backup%'))) THEN '3 · Serviço' ELSE '4 · Sem sinal' END AS fonte, COUNT(*) AS n FROM hosts h WHERE h.status=0 AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM host_tag bt1 WHERE bt1.hostid=h.hostid AND bt1.tag='camada' AND bt1.value='base de dados') AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM host_tag bt2 WHERE bt2.hostid=h.hostid AND bt2.tag='ambiente' AND LOWER(bt2.value) LIKE 'produ%') GROUP BY fonte ORDER BY fonte

SELECT h.host AS `Host`, COALESCE((SELECT t.value FROM host_tag t WHERE t.hostid=h.hostid AND t.tag='servico' LIMIT 1),'—') AS `Sistema`, COALESCE((SELECT t.value FROM host_tag t WHERE t.hostid=h.hostid AND t.tag='departamento' LIMIT 1),'—') AS `Dept`, CASE  WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM items i WHERE i.hostid=h.hostid AND i.status=0 AND i.key_ LIKE 'service.info[%OracleService%') THEN 'Oracle'  WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM items i WHERE i.hostid=h.hostid AND i.status=0 AND (i.key_ LIKE 'service.info[%MSSQL%' OR i.key_ LIKE 'db.odbc.select[mssql.business.master%')) THEN 'MSSQL'  ELSE '?' END AS `Motor`, CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM items i JOIN item_rtdata rt ON rt.itemid=i.itemid WHERE i.hostid=h.hostid AND i.status=0 AND rt.state=0 AND i.key_ LIKE 'db.odbc.select[mssql.business.master%') THEN '1 · ODBC completo' WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM items i JOIN item_rtdata rt ON rt.itemid=i.itemid WHERE i.hostid=h.hostid AND i.status=0 AND rt.state=0 AND (i.name IN ('MSSQL Page life expectancy','MSSQL User Connections','MSSQL Number of Deadlocks/sec') OR i.name LIKE 'MSSQL DB %')) THEN '2 · Perfmon local' WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM items i WHERE i.hostid=h.hostid AND i.status=0 AND (i.key_ LIKE 'service.info["MSSQLSERVER",%' OR i.key_ LIKE 'service.info[MSSQLSERVER,%' OR i.key_ LIKE 'service.info[MSSQL$%' OR i.key_ LIKE 'service.info["MSSQL$%' OR (i.key_ LIKE 'service.info[%OracleService%' AND i.key_ NOT LIKE '%RMAN%' AND i.key_ NOT LIKE '%Backup%'))) THEN '3 · Serviço' ELSE '4 · Sem sinal' END AS `Fonte`, COALESCE((SELECT LEFT(rt.error,90) FROM items i JOIN item_rtdata rt ON rt.itemid=i.itemid  WHERE i.hostid=h.hostid AND i.key_ LIKE 'db.odbc.select[mssql.business.master%' LIMIT 1),'') AS `Erro ODBC` FROM hosts h WHERE h.status=0 AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM host_tag bt1 WHERE bt1.hostid=h.hostid AND bt1.tag='camada' AND bt1.value='base de dados') AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM host_tag bt2 WHERE bt2.hostid=h.hostid AND bt2.tag='ambiente' AND LOWER(bt2.value) LIKE 'produ%') ORDER BY `Fonte`, `Host`

panels.title: Recursos do SO — todos os hosts BD (via variável de tag)

list.label: Hosts BD (regex)
list.name: bd_hosts
list.query: SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(h.host SEPARATOR '|') FROM hosts h WHERE h.status=0 AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM host_tag bt1 WHERE bt1.hostid=h.hostid AND bt1.tag='camada' AND bt1.value='base de dados') AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM host_tag bt2 WHERE bt2.hostid=h.hostid AND bt2.tag='ambiente' AND LOWER(bt2.value) LIKE 'produ%')

dashboard.title: N2 · Bases de Dados — Proposta nativa
